description:
Parent epic: V3 E10: Streaming and AgentView

Source task 1/6 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify `chat_stream/3`, `stream: true`, stream await, and error behavior.

Epic closure criteria:
- streaming and AgentView support a clean UI story
- projected state matches the canonical runtime state

comments.text: Verified streaming contract with tests for stream:true parity, explicit chat_stream, session streaming, await errors, caller-owned sinks, missing targets, option validation, event filtering, polling, timeout, and delta helpers. Full gate passed.

title: E10: Verify chatstream/3, stream: true, stream await, and error behavior
